name: fresherflow
description: Job & Walk-in Opportunity Platform - Proper Monorepo

scripts.postinstall: npx prisma generate --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && turbo run build
scripts.kill:port: powershell -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -EA SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if ($p) { taskkill /F /PID $p } else { Write-Host 'Port 5000 is free' }"
scripts.kill:web-port: powershell -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -EA SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if ($p) { taskkill /F /PID $p } else { Write-Host 'Port 3000 is free' }"
scripts.kill:worker-port: powershell -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5001 -EA SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if ($p) { taskkill /F /PID $p } else { Write-Host 'Port 5001 is free' }"
scripts.kill:admin-mobile-port: powershell -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8082 -EA SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if ($p) { taskkill /F /PID $p } else { Write-Host 'Port 8082 is free' }"
scripts.kill:mobile-port: powershell -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -EA SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if ($p) { taskkill /F /PID $p } else { Write-Host 'Port 8081 is free' }"
scripts.kill:ports: npm run kill:web-port && npm run kill:port && npm run kill:worker-port && npm run kill:admin-mobile-port && npm run kill:mobile-port
scripts.dev: npm run kill:ports && turbo run dev --concurrency=20
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c green,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:start: npm run kill:ports && concurrently -k -n API,WEB,WORKER -c green,cyan,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/worker"
scripts.deploy:api: turbo run db:generate --filter=fresherflow-api && npm run prisma:migrate --workspace=apps/api && turbo run build --filter=fresherflow-api
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/node_modules packages/*/dist node_modules
